aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a strong foundation for local SEO but lacks conversational content and schema markup to be cited by AI assistants effectively.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and answers.
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance and installation tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate hours, but Q&A engagement is lacking.
critical_issues: No active management of Q&A section.
Missing recent posts or updates about services or promotions.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any potential inconsistencies in the future.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational and structured content limits AI assistant citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC repair in Milwaukee' or 'best HVAC services near me'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with HVAC-specific questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts by creating in-depth content on maintenance, energy efficiency, and installation tips.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with structured data and conversational content are more frequently cited by AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates FAQPage and HowTo schema, enhances GBP engagement, and creates authoritative content to position your business as the go-to HVAC expert.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Maximize Your AI Visibility: Are You Ready for the Future of HVAC Leads?
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and found exciting opportunities to boost your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make your HVAC services the top choice for AI-driven searches.
page_title: Trusted HVAC Services in Milwaukee, WI - Oasis Heating & Air LLC
